attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs: {"trajectory": {"thought_0": "I need to find out what role Amanda Crew plays in the movie \"Sex Drive.\" This information is likely available on Wikipedia or similar sources, so I will search for it.", "tool_name_0": "search_wikipedia", "tool_args_0": {"query": "Amanda Crew role in Sex Drive movie"}, "observation_0": ["Amanda Crew | Amanda Catherine Crew (born June 5, 1986) is a Canadian actress. attributes.name: "search_wikipedia"
attributes.mlflow.spanInputs: {"query": "Amanda Crew role in Sex Drive movie"}
attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs: ["Amanda Crew | Amanda Catherine Crew (born June 5, 1986) is a Canadian actress. She is best known for portraying Monica Hall on the HBO sitcom \"Silicon Valley\" (2014–present). Following her film debut in \"Final Destination 3\" (2006), she had lead roles as Felicia Alpine in \"Sex Drive\" (2008) and Tess Carroll in \"Charlie St. Cloud\" (2010), as well as Carrie Miller on the television series \"Whistler\".", "Sex Drive (film) | Sex Drive is a 2008 sex comedy film about a high school graduate who goes on a road trip to have sex with a girl he met online. It is based on the young adult novel \"All the Way\" by American author Andy Behrens. The film was directed by Sean Anders, and stars Josh Zuckerman, Amanda Crew, Clark Duke, Seth Green, and James Marsden, while Katrina Bowden, Alice Greczyn, Michael Cudlitz, Dave Sheridan, and David Koechner appear in supporting roles. It was released in North America on October 17, 2008, and in the United Kingdom on January 9, 2009.", "Amanda Brugel | Amanda Brugel is a Canadian actress. She is perhaps best known for her role as Michelle Krasnoff in the short-lived Canadian comedy series \"Seed\" (2013–2014). In 2013, Brugel co-starred as Vanessa in the Canadian comedy film \"Sex After Kids\", for which she won an ACTRA Award for Best Female Performance. She later appeared in the David Cronenberg satirical drama film \"Maps to the Stars\" (2014), and the BBC-Space science fiction television series \"Orphan Black\" (2015)."]

attributes.mlflow.spanInputs:
{"question": "What is Amanda Crew's role in the movie Sex Drive?", "trajectory": "[[ ## thought_0 ## ]]
I need to find out what role Amanda Crew plays in the movie "Sex Drive." This information is likely available on Wikipedia or similar sources, so I will search for it.

[[ ## tool_name_0 ## ]]
search_wikipedia

[[ ## tool_args_0 ## ]]
{"query": "Amanda Crew role in Sex Drive movie"}

[[ ## observation_0 ## ]]
[1] «Amanda Crew | Amanda Catherine Crew (born June 5, 1986) is a Canadian actress. She is best known for portraying Monica Hall on the HBO sitcom "Silicon Valley" (2014–present). Following her film debut in "Final Destination 3" (2006), she had lead roles as Felicia Alpine in "Sex Drive" (2008) and Tess Carroll in "Charlie St. Cloud" (2010), as well as Carrie Miller on the television series "Whistler".»
[2] «Sex Drive (film) | Sex Drive is a 2008 sex comedy film about a high school graduate who goes on a road trip to have sex with a girl he met online. It is based on the young adult novel "All the Way" by American author Andy Behrens. The film was directed by Sean Anders, and stars Josh Zuckerman, Amanda Crew, Clark Duke, Seth Green, and James Marsden, while Katrina Bowden, Alice Greczyn, Michael Cudlitz, Dave Sheridan, and David Koechner appear in supporting roles. It was released in North America on October 17, 2008, and in the United Kingdom on January 9, 2009.»
[3] «Amanda Brugel | Amanda Brugel is a Canadian actress. She is perhaps best known for her role as Michelle Krasnoff in the short-lived Canadian comedy series "Seed" (2013–2014). In 2013, Brugel co-starred as Vanessa in the Canadian comedy film "Sex After Kids", for which she won an ACTRA Award for Best Female Performance. She later appeared in the David Cronenberg satirical drama film "Maps to the Stars" (2014), and the BBC-Space science fiction television series "Orphan Black" (2015).»"}
